title: The Blood Archivist
description: For two hundred years Sebastian Vael has catalogued the memories of the dead, a vampire bound to a library that grows by one volume each time a mortal dies unmourned. Then a grad student walks in researching a name he buried himself — and Sebastian must decide whether some books are kinder left unread. A gothic slow-burn about grief, memory, and the things we archive instead of feel.

chapters.title: The Library That Eats the Forgotten
